summary_en: Ｇ－ペイクラウドＨＤ authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: Ｇ－ペイクラウドＨＤが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。
